message:
bd-ah61h: GenServer trace schema for all decision points

Add trace events to every call/cast/reply decision path:
- call: enqueued, rejected_cancelled, rejected_stopped, send_cancelled,
  send_failed, no_reply, reply_cancelled
- cast: rejected_cancelled, rejected_stopped, send_cancelled, send_failed
- reply: committed, aborted, caller_gone (existing)
- lifecycle: init, cancel_requested, terminate (existing)
- overflow: cast_evicted_oldest (existing, bd-2o5hg)

All traces use "gen_server::" prefix and are lab-assertable via
Cx::trace / TraceEvent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
